title: tragopogon × neohybridus
intro: Tragopogon × neohybridus, also known as the Salsify or Goat's Beard, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the sunflower family and is a cross between Tragopogon dubius and Tragopogon pratensis. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Tragopogon × neohybridus include its ability to help lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and reduce symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Tragopogon × neohybridus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried root extract, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
